title: Desktop App Runtime Performance Execution
consumer_purpose: Execute all four slices of desktop runtime performance improvements — port discovery fix, lazy IPC, deferred context-menu, async CA certs, non-blocking sidecar health check, code splitting, shell env probe optimization, and renderer CSS audit
claim_atoms: Port discovery eliminated: sidecar listens on 0, reports port in 'ready' message
electron-context-menu deferred to after window creation
IPC handlers lazy-registered: only essential handlers registered at startup
Main window shown before sidecar health check completes
Sidecar fork triggered earlier in startup sequence
Code-split main process: dynamic import for zip.js, marked
Loading screen CSS reduced: minimal styles, no full app bundle
Shell env probe made async or non-interactive
All changes additive to existing dirty files
content:
Desktop App Runtime Performance Execution Plan

== SCOPE ==
Execute all four improvement slices identified in the desktop runtime audit across packages/desktop/. The existing dirty files from prior sessions must be preserved — all changes are additive.

== SLICE 1 — IMMEDIATE WINS ==

Task 1.1: Eliminate Port Discovery (sidecar.ts + server.ts + index.ts)
- Current: main process creates TCP server on port 0, listens, gets port, closes server, then passes port to sidecar
- Target: sidecar process listens on port 0 internally, reports bound port in 'ready' message
- Changes: sidecar.ts start() binds to port 0 and reports real port; server.ts spawnLocalServer handles dynamic port; index.ts port discovery block removed
- Files: packages/desktop/src/main/sidecar.ts, packages/desktop/src/main/server.ts, packages/desktop/src/main/index.ts

Task 1.2: Defer electron-context-menu (index.ts)
- Current: import at module top, contextMenu() called as first line of main Effect
- Target: move contextMenu() call to after createMainWindow()
- Files: packages/desktop/src/main/index.ts

Task 1.3: Lazy IPC Handler Registration (ipc.ts + index.ts)
- Current: all 46 handlers registered in single registerIpcHandlers() call before app.whenReady()
- Target: register only essential handlers early (sidecar lifecycle, window config, deep links); lazy-register the rest
- Files: packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts, packages/desktop/src/main/index.ts

Task 1.4: Async CA Certificate Loading (index.ts)
- Current: synchronous getCACertificates blocking Phase 1
- Target: make async, move to after app.whenReady
- Files: packages/desktop/src/main/index.ts

== SLICE 2 — SIDECAR BOOT ==

Task 2.1: Non-blocking Sidecar Health Check (index.ts + server.ts + preload/types.ts)
- Target: show main window before health check completes, pass status to renderer
- Files: packages/desktop/src/main/index.ts, packages/desktop/src/main/server.ts

Task 2.2: Earlier Sidecar Fork (index.ts)
- Target: trigger sidecar fork as early as possible in sequence
- Files: packages/desktop/src/main/index.ts

== SLICE 3 — BUNDLE OPTIMIZATION ==

Task 3.1: Code-split Main Process (logging.ts, markdown.ts)
- Target: dynamic import for @zip.js/zip.js and marked
- Files: packages/desktop/src/main/logging.ts, packages/desktop/src/main/markdown.ts

Task 3.2: Loading Screen CSS Audit (loading.tsx, loading.html)
- Target: minimal loading CSS, avoid full app bundle
- Files: packages/desktop/src/renderer/loading.tsx

== SLICE 4 — SHELL ENV ==

Task 4.1: Optimize Shell Env Probe (shell-env.ts)
- Target: non-interactive shell probe, reduced timeout, cached result
- Files: packages/desktop/src/main/shell-env.ts
